evidence: "Shows what it could be like living under Japanese and Nazi rule if we had lost WWII."
"Very violent subject matter but somehow keeps your attention."
"The writers and actors keep the tension high and you can't wait for another 'fix'."
"As the story line progresses, you keep wanting more."
"Edge of your seat viewing all the way."
"Started slow but picked up steam with a lot of grizzly action."
"All the actors played their parts to a tee."
"Great writing. Loved it! Not your usual TV fare."
"Shows how the human spirit can endure extreme hardship and the strength of a mothers love for her child."
"Hard to watch at times. Get a box of tissues and keep it close by."
"The strength of a mothers love for her child."

summary: The user has a strong preference for engaging dramas with complex narratives and fast pacing. They appreciate high production quality and emotional depth in storytelling, often resonating with themes of hardship and resilience.
